cycle_notes: v2->v3: 11 fixes from DeepSeek analysis of 552 decisions (83% fold rate). Loosened all entry/call/fold thresholds by 0.08. Added connector/broadway see-flop logic. Expected: fold rate 60-70%, +10 to +15 BB/100.
core_principle: Only enter pots with the hand. When you have it, play it perfectly. When you do not, fold immediately. Exception: speculative hands (connectors, suited, broadway) get to see the flop before deciding.

speculative_hand_see_flop.note: Connectors (gap<=2) and broadway (rank>=T) get discounted EHS threshold to see the flop. Suited hands get +0.04 EHS bonus.

preflop.reasoning: Loosened from v2: open_ip 0.58->0.50, open_oop 0.68->0.60, call_ip 0.60->0.52, call_oop 0.71->0.63, 3bet 0.75->0.67. Fixes 83% fold rate. Connectors/broadway now see flop before folding.

flop.reasoning: call_min 0.55->0.47, fold_max 0.48->0.40. Fixes 41 bad flop folds. Value/raise thresholds unchanged (0 bad raises).

turn.reasoning: call_min 0.55->0.47, fold_max 0.52->0.44. Consistent with flop loosening.

river.reasoning: call_min 0.60->0.52, fold_max 0.58->0.50. Reduces over-folding on river.

aggression.note: Tiered bet sizing by EHS. Near-certain win (>=0.90) -> all-in. Highly likely (>=0.78) -> 1.2x pot. Likely (>=0.65) -> 0.75x pot. Set by DeepSeek EV simulation each cycle.

history_review.note: DeepSeek reviews hand history each cycle: did the action taken win/lose, would opposite action have won? Changes are only made when regret count exceeds 10 per category.

constraints: NEVER raise or bet without EHS meeting the minimum for that street
NEVER call if pot odds require equity we do not have
NEVER bluff unless bluff_enabled=true AND specific conditions are met
ALWAYS play trap (check then check-raise) with EHS above trap threshold
ALWAYS overbet when board pairs our hole cards and EHS above board_hit threshold
ALWAYS value bet directly when EHS is above value threshold, even if trap threshold is also exceeded, unless opponent is confirmed aggressive
ALWAYS give connectors (gap<=2) and broadway (rank>=T) a chance to see the flop before folding — use speculative_hand_see_flop thresholds
NEVER fold a speculative hand preflop without first checking if it qualifies for the see-flop bonus
